summary: Iteration 8 verified end-to-end. Backend: new GET /api/admin/broker-connections endpoint passes auth checks (401 no-token, 403 non-admin, 200 admin), correctly decrypts broker_password (Top$ecret#1 round-trip), returns client_email/client_username/client_contact/license_key/ea_name/mentor_*/platform/broker_server/broker_account/connected_at/status fields, sorts desc by connected_at, and row disappears after /mobile/disconnect-broker. Regression on /mobile/check-email, /mobile/activate-license, /mobile/connect-broker is green. Frontend: /admin/brokers route gated by AdminRoute (unauth → /admin), Brokers nav button on dashboard routes correctly, row renders all required data-testids, password masked by default and reveals decrypted value on toggle, copy buttons rendered, search filter works for client/email/licence/server/account. Emergent badge fully removed from DOM on /, /app, /admin/dashboard; <title> is 'ea-central · Mobile EA'. 9/9 backend tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_broker_connections (server.py:1209-1239) does a per-row DB lookup for license_keys and users — fine at current scale but consider an aggregation $lookup or batched fetch if broker_connections grows beyond a few hundred rows.
broker_password is returned fully decrypted in the admin API response; ensure this endpoint stays admin-gated and consider auditing access (no audit log currently).

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 acceptance criteria pass. Broker connections endpoint and admin page are stable. If retesting, re-link the broker via POST /api/mobile/connect-broker (see test_credentials) before exercising /admin/brokers — the test cleans up at the end.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found in this iteration.
